# `umask` for [platform](/commands/categories/platform.md)

<div class='command-title'>Get or set default file creation permissions.</div>

## Signature

```> umask {flags} (permissions)```

## Parameters

 -  `permissions`: The permissions to set on created files.


## Input/output types:

| input   | output |
| ------- | ------ |
| nothing | string |
## Examples

Print current default file creation permissions.
```nu
> umask

```

Make new files read-only to group and inaccessible to others.
```nu
> umask rwxr-x---

```

## Notes
When setting a new mask, the previous mask will be returned.
